mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CLASS ( CLASS_ID, YEAR, SEMESTER, GRADE, CLASS_NO, CLASS_NAME, CLASS_STATUS, ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN, INVITE_CODE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, DEFAULT_DUE_TIME, DESCRIPTION ) VALUES ( #{classId}, #{dto.year}, #{dto.semester}, #{dto.grade}, #{dto.classNo}, #{dto.className}, 'ACTIVE', 1, #{inviteCode}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, '23:59', #{dto.description} )
INSERT INTO TEACHER_CLASS ( T_CLASS_ID, TEACHER_ID, CLASS_ID, START_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, ASSIGNED_AT ) VALUES ( #{teacherClassId}, #{teacherId}, #{classId}, SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC2 WHERE SC2.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID ) AS memberCount FROM CLASS C JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND C.CLASS_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY C.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName FROM CLASS C JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND C.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC2 WHERE SC2.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID ) AS memberCount FROM CLASS C JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE SC.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId}
AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY C.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.TEACHER_NAME AS teacherName FROM CLASS C JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE SC.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND C.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, MAX(T.TEACHER_NAME) AS teacherName, LISTAGG(S.STUDENT_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.STUDENT_NAME) AS childName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC2 WHERE SC2.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND SC2.END_DATE IS NULL ) AS memberCount FROM CLASS C JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID JOIN STUDENT_PARENT SP ON SP.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID AND SP.LINK_STATUS = 1 JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL GROUP BY C.CLASS_ID, C.YEAR, C.SEMESTER, C.GRADE, C.CLASS_NO, C.CLASS_NAME, C.CLASS_STATUS, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN, C.INVITE_CODE, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME, C.DESCRIPTION, C.CREATED_AT ORDER BY C.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.YEAR AS year, C.SEMESTER AS semester, C.GRADE AS grade, C.CLASS_NO AS classNo, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, C.CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN AS allowSubmissionModifyYn, C.INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME AS defaultDueTime, C.DESCRIPTION AS description, MAX(T.TEACHER_NAME) AS teacherName, LISTAGG(S.STUDENT_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.STUDENT_NAME) AS childName FROM CLASS C JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID JOIN STUDENT_PARENT SP ON SP.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID AND SP.LINK_STATUS = 1 JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER_CLASS TC ON TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND C.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL GROUP BY C.CLASS_ID, C.YEAR, C.SEMESTER, C.GRADE, C.CLASS_NO, C.CLASS_NAME, C.CLASS_STATUS, C.ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN, C.INVITE_CODE, C.DEFAULT_DUE_TIME, C.DESCRIPTION

SELECT CLASS_ID AS classId, YEAR AS year, SEMESTER AS semester, GRADE AS grade, CLASS_NO AS classNo, CLASS_NAME AS className, CLASS_STATUS AS classStatus, INVITE_CODE AS inviteCode, DESCRIPTION AS description FROM CLASS WHERE UPPER(INVITE_CODE) = UPPER(#{inviteCode}) AND CLASS_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENT_CLASS ( STUDENT_CLASS_ID, STUDENT_ID, CLASS_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE ) VALUES ( #{studentClassId}, #{studentId}, #{classId}, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE CLASS SET CLASS_NAME = #{dto.className}, CLASS_STATUS = #{dto.classStatus}, GRADE = #{dto.grade}, CLASS_NO = #{dto.classNo}, DESCRIPTION = #{dto.description}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = CLASS.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )

UPDATE CLASS SET DEFAULT_DUE_TIME = #{dto.defaultDueTime}, ALLOW_SUBMISSION_MODIFY_YN = #{dto.allowSubmissionModifyYn}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = CLASS.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )

UPDATE CLASS SET INVITE_CODE = #{inviteCode}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = CLASS.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )

UPDATE CLASS SET CLASS_STATUS = 'ARCHIVED', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = CLASS.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' )

WITH ACTIVE_LEARN AS ( SELECT LL.CLASS_ID, LC.LEARN_ID FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_LIST_ID = LL.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ), LEARN_PROGRESS AS ( SELECT LP.STUDENT_ID, AL.CLASS_ID, LP.LEARN_ID, MAX(NVL(LP.PROGRESS_RATE, 0)) AS PROGRESS_RATE, MAX(CASE WHEN LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS COMPLETED_YN FROM LEARN_PRO LP JOIN ACTIVE_LEARN AL ON AL.LEARN_ID = LP.LEARN_ID GROUP BY LP.STUDENT_ID, AL.CLASS_ID, LP.LEARN_ID ), LEARN_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT AL.LEARN_ID) AS TOTAL_LEARNING_COUNT, NVL(SUM(NVL(LP.PROGRESS_RATE, 0)), 0) AS LEARNING_PROGRESS_SUM, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(LP.COMPLETED_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS COMPLETED_LEARNING_COUNT FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC LEFT JOIN ACTIVE_LEARN AL ON AL.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID LEFT JOIN LEARN_PROGRESS LP ON LP.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND LP.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID AND LP.LEARN_ID = AL.LEARN_ID WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL GROUP BY SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID ), LAST_ASSIGN_SUB AS ( SELECT SUB.ASSIGN_ID, SUB.STUDENT_ID, SUB.SUB_ID, SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, SUB.SUBMIT_AT, SUB.RETURN_REASON FROM ASSIGN_SUB SUB JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = SUB.SUB_ID ), ASSIGNMENT_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID, COUNT(A.ASSIGN_ID) AS TOTAL_ASSIGNMENT_COUNT, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN LAS.SUB_ID IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN UPPER(NVL(LAS.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('NOT_SUBMITTED') OR LAS.SUBMIT_STATUS = '미제출' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ), 0) AS SUBMITTED_ASSIGNMENT_COUNT FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC LEFT JOIN ASSIGNMENT A ON A.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 LEFT JOIN LAST_ASSIGN_SUB LAS ON LAS.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID AND LAS.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL GROUP BY SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID ) SELECT SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID AS studentClassId, S.STUDENT_ID AS studentId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY S.STUDENT_NAME ASC, S.STUDENT_ID ASC) AS studentNo, S.STUDENT_NAME AS studentName, SUBSTR(S.STUDENT_NAME, 1, 1) AS nameFirst, S.PHONE AS phone, S.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profileImage, S.INTRO AS intro, S.PARENT_LINK_CODE AS parentLinkCode, NVL(SC.OBSERVATION_MEMO, '') AS observationMemo, NVL(( SELECT LISTAGG(SCT.TAG_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SCT.TAG_NAME) FROM STUDENT_CLASS_TAG SCT WHERE SCT.STUDENT_CLASS_ID = SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID ), '') AS tagsCsv, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP WHERE SP.STUDENT_ID = S.STUDENT_ID AND SP.LINK_STATUS = 1 AND SP.UNLINKED_AT IS NULL ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS parentLinked, ( SELECT MAX(SP.RELATION_TYPE) FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP WHERE SP.STUDENT_ID = S.STUDENT_ID AND SP.LINK_STATUS = 1 AND SP.UNLINKED_AT IS NULL ) AS parentRelationType, NVL(TO_CHAR(M.LAST_LOGIN_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), '접속 기록 없음') AS lastLoginAtText, CASE WHEN NVL(LS.TOTAL_LEARNING_COUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(NVL(LS.LEARNING_PROGRESS_SUM, 0) / LS.TOTAL_LEARNING_COUNT) END AS learningProgressRate, NVL(LS.TOTAL_LEARNING_COUNT, 0) AS totalLearningCount, NVL(LS.COMPLETED_LEARNING_COUNT, 0) AS completedLearningCount, NVL(ASG.TOTAL_ASSIGNMENT_COUNT, 0) AS totalAssignmentCount, NVL(ASG.SUBMITTED_ASSIGNMENT_COUNT, 0) AS submittedAssignmentCount, CASE WHEN NVL(ASG.TOTAL_ASSIGNMENT_COUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(NVL(ASG.SUBMITTED_ASSIGNMENT_COUNT, 0) * 100 / ASG.TOTAL_ASSIGNMENT_COUNT) END AS assignmentSubmitRate FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID JOIN MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_ID = S.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN LEARN_SUMMARY LS ON LS.STUDENT_CLASS_ID = SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID LEFT JOIN ASSIGNMENT_SUMMARY ASG ON ASG.STUDENT_CLASS_ID = SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND TC.END_DATE IS NULL ) ORDER BY S.STUDENT_NAME ASC, S.STUDENT_ID ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID = #{studentClassId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND TC.END_DATE IS NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT_CLASS SC SET SC.OBSERVATION_MEMO = #{dto.observationMemo}, SC.START_DATE = SC.START_DATE WHERE SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID = #{dto.studentClassId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND TC.END_DATE IS NULL )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENT_CLASS_TAG ( STUDENT_CLASS_TAG_ID, STUDENT_CLASS_ID, TAG_NAME, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{studentClassTagId}, #{studentClassId}, #{tagName}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT_CLASS SC SET SC.END_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SC.STUDENT_CLASS_ID = #{studentClassId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND TC.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND TC.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND TC.END_DATE IS NULL )
UPDATE STUDENT_CLASS SET START_DATE = SYSDATE, END_DATE = NULL WHERE STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT S.STUDENT_ID AS studentId, S.STUDENT_NAME AS studentName, C.CLASS_ID AS classId, C.CLASS_NAME AS className, NVL(C.GRADE, 0) AS grade, NVL(C.CLASS_NO, 0) AS classNo FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SP.STUDENT_ID JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.STUDENT_ID = S.STUDENT_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL JOIN CLASS C ON C.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND SP.LINK_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY S.STUDENT_NAME ASC, C.CLASS_ID DESC
